title: A visit to the radio station
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Last week, our class visited a small radio station in the town centre. We were shown around (27) a presenter who had worked there for many years. She explained that a lot of planning happens before each programme goes on air. I had always thought presenters simply spoke into a microphone, but there is much more work involved (28) that. We watched a short interview and learned how music, news and adverts are organised. One student asked (29) the station chose which songs to play, and the presenter gave a clear answer. Afterwards, we were allowed to record a short message ourselves. I was nervous at first, (30) I enjoyed hearing my voice through the speakers. Before we left, the presenter advised us to listen carefully to local news (31) we wanted to understand our community better. The visit was interesting from start (32) finish.

questions.explanation: Passive agent: shown around by someone.
Fixed expression: from start to finish.
